message:
Fix Gantt task ID collisions, improve edge label positioning, and add multi-line support to SVG and terminal renderers

- Append line number to Gantt task IDs to prevent collisions when
  multiple tasks share the same normalized identifier
- Position edge labels at the geometric midpoint of the middle segment
  for 4-point orthogonal paths instead of using a discrete point index,
  producing more visually centered labels
- Add multi-line label rendering to SVG node and edge label output,
  computing vertical offset from line count and line height
- Add multi-line label support to terminal renderer for both node
  labels and edge labels, centering text blocks vertically within
  node boundaries
- Render edge labels in terminal output at the midpoint of edge paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
